summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sketchario V4 Iteration 6 features including forgot password, notifications, analytics, Google Drive import, and responsive design

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error when importing from Google Drive
flaky_endpoints.impact: Google Drive import feature not working

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error when importing from Canva

passed_tests: GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns proper count (1 unread, 1 total)
GET /api/analytics/{project_id} returns complete analytics data with by_format, by_pillar, by_status
Forgot password link visible and functional on auth page
Analytics tab shows stat cards (4 cards) and bar charts (9 charts)
CSV export button visible and clickable in project header
Mobile responsive design - bottom navigation working perfectly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Google Drive import endpoint (/api/media/import-drive) and Canva import endpoint (/api/canva/import) which are returning 500 errors. These are likely due to external service configuration issues or missing error handling.
